data.title: SHIB expected to reach $0.000025 by Jan 2026. Neutral momentum, RSI 35.71. Break key resistance for target in 4-6 weeks.
data.description: Shiba Inu is currently exhibiting a neutral momentum, as indicated by the Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 35.71. This information suggests a possible upward movement in the value of SHIB in the near future, with key numerical markers highlighting the potential trajectory.

data.title: Hanshow partners with University of Cambridge for research on intelligent hybrid wireless technology; aims to innovate future technology.
data.description: A leading provider of electronic shelf labels (ESL) and digital store solutions, Hanshow, has initiated a long-term partnership with the renowned University of Cambridge. This collaboration aims to conduct research and drive innovation in cutting-edge intelligent hybrid wireless technologies. Representing a significant step in Hanshow's commitment to advancing core technologies and fostering long-lasting innovation, this partnership signifies their dedication to staying at the forefront of technological advancements.
